utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Okay look , I have an idea .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Why do not we , why do not we see what kind of number he has on his speed dial , and then from that we can tell who has more in common with him .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: And then whoever does gets the phone .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: All right , first name on the speed dial is mom .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Ohh , I lost my mom to suicide .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Okay no way , you cannot use that to get the cute guy and the last blueberry muffin .

emotion_cause.span: 6_you cannot use that to get the cute guy and the last blueberry muffin .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Did I use that already today ? I am sorry .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh , I win ! He is got Barney’s on his speed dial .

emotion_cause.span: 9_I win ! He is got Barney’s on his speed dial .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: So you do not know that is Barney’s the store ! That can be y’know his friend’s house , or a bar . Who has Barney’s the store on their speed dial ?

emotion_cause.span: 10_you do not know that is Barney’s the store !
